steps: Submit tax reclaim form to Citigroup Australia for BHP Group Ltd dividend citing AU-NO treaty 15% rate versus 25% withheld
Provide Norwegian tax residency certificate to support treaty eligibility for reduced withholding
Request AUD 138,750 refund representing excess withholding (25% applied vs 15% treaty rate on AUD 1,387,500 gross)
Escalate to ATO directly if Citigroup cannot process reclaim within standard timeframe

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
